CONTENT.Career: A youth product of Lorient, Le Bris began his senior career with their reserves, and started training with their first team in 2021. He made his professional debut with Lorient in a 2–1 Ligue 1 win over Lille on 10 September 2021.
CONTENT.Personal life: Théo was born in a family of footballer players; his father Benoît and uncle Régis, who was his manager at Lorient, were professional footballers in France.

SUMMARY: Théo Le Bris (born 1 October 2002) is a French professional footballer who plays as a right-back for  Ligue 2 club Lorient.
